ddt:Target.Name: TCU_GEN2_LL_ERAGLONASS_V2
ddt:Target.Description:
*** V1.0: 01/02/2018 *** ***************************** -Creation of the DDT Data Base (DRC25_TCU GEN2 LL V0.4)
************************************************************************************************ *** V2.0 14-08-2018 *** ***************************** DRC25_TCU GEN2 LL V3.0 and V3.1
value $02 deleted from DID $0114 Numeric list updated for DID $FD71 Data type changed for DID $FD1D Byte 16 data modified for DID $FE06 Data coding modified for DID $FE08 ,$6C02. Bit6 data deleted from DID $6C04 DID $6C2E,$6C2F ,$6CC6,$6CDC ,$6CDF,$6D6E,$6D6A,$6D68,$6D64,$6D63,$6D62,$6D61,$6D60 ,$6D57 ,$6D56,$6D50,$6D51 ,$6D46 deleted $03 value deleted from DID $6C71 $02 deleted from DID $6CB4 Byte length modified and byte 0 data deleted for DID $6CDA,$6CDB DID name,Byte lenght changed for DID $FDA2 Conversion Formula changed for DID $6DE5 Conversion Formula updated for DID $6DE0 Data type changed to numeric for DID $6D7A,$6D79 Conversion formula updated for DID $6D75 Added DID $6D59 Coding value updated for DID $6D54,$6D48 Data type changed and added numeric list for byte 0 of DID SIM status ($6D24) DTC $930455 added IO control "Microphone connection check","loudspeaker connection check","control of Illumination of LEDs" and "Control of BUB Charge" added Stop routine removed from routine controls Optional parameters modified for routine control $0A Byte lenght modified for response of routine $0A. Removed routine "ECALL GNSSDATA RATE","ECALL GNSS MIN ELEVATION" Accessibility changed for $6CB6 DID DTC $9302 15 added IO Controls $01/$05/$0B: Optional parameters added DID $FE08 value $00 modified DID $6CC5 and $6CBC only readable
************************************************************************************************

Item.Text: Registered to network: TCU ON TX VOICE
Not register to network: TCU in Silent Mode (Spy Mode)
RF Activated and Transmission ongoing: TCU ON TX
RF Activated and No Transmission ongoing: TCU ON RF ON
RF not activated: TCU ON RF OFF
Time synchronisation with server 1 (GDC) activated and with GPS if no service on server 1 is active

Data.Name: USB Definition
Data.Description: Configuration of USB connection to NFA or MFD or de-actived;

Item.Text: No retry until next ON cycle
Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level oor/ zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: No automatic eCall has ever been detected before
End of Life of the Battery
The system shall launch automatic eCall directly on {Crash_Detected} signal
The system shall apply crash detection algorithms defined in [CRASH-MNG]

Data.Name: NETWORK_MONITORING.NOKtoOK
Data.Comment: representing last time the TCU network status changed from NOK to OK

Data.Name: NETWORK_MONITORING.OKtoNOK
Data.Comment: representing last time the TCU network status changed from OK to NOK

Item.Text: Outgoing MSD by SMS not blocked

Data.Name: CUSTOMER_REQUEST.manualEcallByCombinationOfShortPush
Data.Comment: manual eCall by combination of short push

Data.Name: Ecall DURATION LED ON AT START

Item.Text: False (callback request by sms is not allowed)
True (callback request by sms is allowed)

List.Item: Response to control status when test in progress

Item.Text: Control stopped by Control option parameter set to 'Stop control'

Data.Name: IOCBLID.ECALL LED MALFUNCTION GREEN_dutycycle
Data.Comment: ECALL LED MALFUNCTION GREEN duty cycle

Data.Name: IOCBLID.ECALL LED MALFUNCTION RED_dutycycle
Data.Comment: ECALL LED MALFUNCTION RED duty cycle

Data.Name: IOCBLID.LED BACKLIGHT_dutycycle
Data.Comment: ECALL LED MALFUNCTION RED duty cycle

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_GPS position
Data.Comment: GPS position at eCall launching moment

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_Kilometers
Data.Comment: Kilometers of the vehicle when the ecall started

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_Velocity
Data.Comment: Velocity of the vehicle when the ecall started

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_Coverage level
Data.Comment: Coverage level at eCall launching moment

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_eCall started status
Data.Comment: eCall started remotely (TRUE) or launched from the vehicle (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_Voice communication
Data.Comment: Voice communication was established (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_SEND_MSD
Data.Comment: SEND_MSD request was received during the call (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_Type of call Automatic
Data.Comment: Type of call Automatic (TRUE) or Manual (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_PSAP acknowledgement
Data.Comment: The PSAP acknowledgement was received by the system

Data.Name: Routine.REQUEST_ECALL_HISTORIC_MSD was sent during the eCall
Data.Comment: The MSD was sent during the eCall (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_GPS position at eCall launching moment
Data.Comment: GPS position at eCall launching moment

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_Kilometers of the vehicle when the ecall started
Data.Comment: Kilometers of the vehicle when the ecall started

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_Velocity of the vehicle when the ecall started
Data.Comment: Velocity of the vehicle when the ecall started

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_MSD data from the vehicle
Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_Coverage level at eCall launching moment
Data.Comment: Coverage level at eCall launching moment

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_Voice communication
Data.Comment: Voice communication was established (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_Type of call Automatic
Data.Comment: Type of call Automatic (TRUE) or Manual (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_SEND_MSD
Data.Comment: SEND_MSD request was received during the call (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_PSAP acknowledgement
Data.Comment: The PSAP acknowledgement was received by the system

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_eCall started status
Data.Comment: eCall started remotely (TRUE) or launched from the vehicle (FALSE)

Data.Name: Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_Duration of voice communication
Routine_CREATE HISTORIC REGISTER_MSD was sent during the eCall
Data.Comment: The MSD was sent during the eCall (TRUE) or not (FALSE)

Data.Name: TCU Time.Milliseconds from beginning of the week

Item.Text: if NAD is On (Telematic microcontroller is fully operative, SIM Ready)

Data.Name: Service Provisioning.Charge Spot short term booking.status.activation
Service Provisioning.Charging activation or stop by remote.status.activation

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request for old ECU

Test.Description: certificat d'authentification de la TCU auprès du GDC

Label.Text: - Hard Reset : Simulates TCU power ON
- Key OFF ON Reset : Used in factory
- Soft Reset : restart the application without reinitializing previously learned configuration data
- Configuration Reset : Reset configuration parameters to default values

Screen.Name: Current First Previous Zone Response SST

Label.Text: Milliseconds from beginning of the week

Label.Text: Charge spot finder upgrade 3 to 24 spots
GBA : Inhibition/disinhibition of charge if customer
GBA : Battery usage & charge history = Health Certificate update 2012
Low battery alert upgrade on remote Phone
Charge spot finder upgrade availability + compatibility
Create private charge spot off board & download in my car over the air
LIVE services : All Tomtom LIVE services
